profile.name: Mr. Tanmay Santosh Khairnar
profile.title: Data Engineer | Analytics Engineer | Machine Learning Engineer (Projects)
profile.summary: Data Engineer with a strong backend engineering foundation and close to three years of industry experience building scalable data and backend systems for analytics and reporting. Experienced in Python, SQL, ETL-style pipelines, data modeling, and production-grade APIs. Hands-on experience with machine learning, big data, and LLM-based systems through structured personal and academic projects. Currently pursuing a Master’s in Business Analytics & Data Science and seeking Data Engineer or Analytics Engineer roles, with ML engineering exposure through projects.

professional_experience.context: Production backend and data systems supporting analytics and reporting workloads
responsibilities: Improved P95 API response time by approximately 35% through SQL query optimization, analytics query tuning, targeted indexing, and response caching.
Reduced database load by around 40% by eliminating N+1 query patterns, optimizing joins, and redesigning analytics query paths and reporting layers.

Built and maintained 15+ Python-based REST APIs using FastAPI and Django to ingest, validate, and transform application data into analytics-ready datasets for reporting workloads supporting over 10,000 active users.
Enabled backend and data services supporting data ingestion pipelines to scale to nearly 2× peak traffic through async request handling, pagination strategies, and efficient connection management.

Improved production stability and data quality by introducing input validation, centralized error handling, structured logging, and automated tests, reducing recurring backend incidents by approximately 25%.
Containerized backend and data services using Docker, reducing deployment and rollback time by around 40% and improving environment consistency across development and production.
Worked in Agile sprints using Git-based workflows and CI/CD pipelines, delivering frequent releases with zero downtime.

experimental_experience.area: Big Data, Machine Learning & GenAI Systems
experimental_experience.note: All tools in this section were used in personal, academic, or experimental contexts, not in production company systems.
details: Built batch-style ETL pipelines using PySpark to understand distributed data transformations and performance trade-offs.
Used MLflow to track experiments, compare metrics, and manage model versions.
Trained and evaluated machine learning models using Scikit-learn and TensorFlow on structured datasets.
Explored LLM-based solutions using Hugging Face and OpenAI APIs for text classification and question answering prototypes.

projects.title: AI-Powered Interactive Resume Platform
projects.description: An interactive resume platform treating resume data as structured input, combining dashboards, a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) based chatbot, and a machine learning-driven career prediction engine.
outcomes: Designed a centralized resume data model in PostgreSQL serving as a single source of truth across dashboards, ML models, and LLM applications.
Implemented a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) pipeline using FAISS to ground LLM responses and reduce hallucinated outputs.
Built and deployed an end-to-end ML inference pipeline for career path probability prediction using structured resume features.
Containerized the application using Docker to ensure reproducible local and cloud deployments.

projects.title: Weather ETL Pipeline & Analytics System
projects.description: Built an end-to-end ETL pipeline scheduled using Cron jobs to collect, clean, and store real-time weather data into PostgreSQL with automated analytics and alerting.
outcomes: Implemented scheduled ETL workflows using Cron jobs to ingest and persist real-time weather data into PostgreSQL.
Designed data cleaning, validation, and transformation logic to generate analytics-ready datasets.
Built threshold-based email alerts to detect anomalous weather conditions.
Enabled scheduled reporting and visualization dashboards to support operational and analytical insights.

projects.title: Wine Quality Prediction System
projects.description: Developed and deployed a machine learning pipeline to predict wine quality with full experiment tracking and CI/CD-enabled deployment.
outcomes: Developed an end-to-end machine learning pipeline covering data preprocessing, model training, evaluation, and deployment.
Tracked experiments, metrics, and model versions using MLflow for reproducibility.
Deployed containerized models on AWS using CI/CD pipelines.

projects.title: Fake News Detection System
projects.description: Built an NLP-based machine learning system to classify news articles as real or fake and deployed it as an interactive web application.
outcomes: Implemented an NLP pipeline including text preprocessing, feature extraction, and model evaluation.
Trained and evaluated binary classification models using standard ML metrics.
Deployed the model as an interactive web application for real-time predictions.

education.degree: Master’s in Business Analytics & Data Science

courses.title: Unlocking the Power of Big Data

certifications.name: Microsoft Certified: Power BI Data Analyst Associate

extracurricular_activities: Actively participate in football and table tennis, demonstrating teamwork, discipline, and consistency.
Support education for underprivileged children by donating books and clothes.
Contributed to charitable educational initiatives at Adhartirth Children Ashram, Trimbak, Pegalwadi, Maharashtra – 422213.
